name: Radio Button
description: Mutually exclusive single-selection controls using RadioButton and RadioButtonGroup.

checked.description: Marks a RadioButton as selected. In groups, selected state is typically managed via group value/defaultValue.

disabled.description: Disables interaction. Group disabled state propagates to child RadioButton controls.

label.description: Visible content displayed next to radio icon.

readOnly.description: Read-only behavior. Prefer setting readOnly on RadioButtonGroup rather than standalone radios.

value.description: Option value used for group selection and controlled state.

validationStatus.description: Validation state. RadioButton visual styles apply for warning/error; success has no visual styling.

radioButtonGroup.defaultValue.description: Initial selected value for uncontrolled group usage.

radioButtonGroup.value.description: Controlled selected value for group usage.

radioButtonGroup.onChange.description: Called when selected option changes in the group.

radioButtonGroup.wrap.description: Horizontal-only text wrapping behavior; false keeps horizontal alignment and wraps text within each option.

radioButtonGroup.name.description: Shared input name applied to nested radios. Auto-generated if omitted.

radioButtonGroup.disabled.description: Disables all radio options in the group.

radioButtonGroup.validationStatus.description: Validation status at group level; takes precedence over nested control statuses.

slots.label: Radio label content, supports text or richer ReactNode descriptions.
slots.radioButtonGroup.children: One or more RadioButton controls grouped in a fieldset.

keyboard: Tab — focuses checked radio in group, or first radio if none selected
Space — checks focused radio when not already selected
Arrow keys (Up/Down/Left/Right) — move focus and selection across options
aria: Provide accessible group labeling using visible FormField label or aria-label / aria-labelledby
Group readOnly is reflected with aria-readonly
